candidates.ai_rationale: AI proposal from LLM-fallback pilot (v0.1.10). The LLM extracted 4 tool(s) from the package source: 21st_magic_component_builder, 21st_magic_component_inspiration, logo_search, 21st_magic_component_refiner.
